claim_boundary: Every method receives only n, k, delta, a fresh canonical oracle handle, and the atomic query cap.
Family, design gap, fixture seed, latent angles, Top-k truth, ties, and stopping histories remain trusted-harness data and are not algorithm inputs.
The fixed-phase methods sample exact Grover reward-measurement laws but do not execute a coherent QPE register.
The public-cap unknown-time method is a serial adaptive composition with a post-run L2 proxy; it does not execute coherent variable-time search or VTAA.
F-PUBLIC-PARTITION is excluded because it is a stronger-information interface; counting it without supplying the partition would duplicate F-HIDDEN-FRONTIER.
These controls do not activate strongest-literature-baseline coverage and support no hardware, theorem, quantum-advantage, or CCF-A claim.
